subject: feat(brand): simplify icon to chart-bars-only with 4 Dracula colors
body:
Drop the git branch symbol — it cluttered the icon and didn't read
well at small sizes. The app shows analytics; the icon shows analytics.

Four distinct Dracula semantic colors for the bars: purple (secondary),
pink (primary), cyan (info), orange (accent). Wider bars (128px vs 96px)
and taller range for better visual impact. Clean and instantly readable
at both 512px and 48px favicon size.

Tags: brand, ui
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theming
Semver: patch
